query:
SELECT 
  sr.id as run_id,
  sr.scenarioId as scenario_id,
  sr.isDemo as is_demo,
  sr.status,
  sr.startedAt as started_at,
  sr.completedAt as completed_at,
  u.name as student_name,
  u.role,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as transaction_count,
  SUM(se.pointsDelta) as total_score
FROM scenario_runs sr
JOIN users u ON sr.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.runId = sr.id
LEFT JOIN scoring_events se ON se.runId = sr.id
WHERE u.name = 'Expert Validator'
GROUP BY sr.id, sr.scenarioId, sr.isDemo, sr.status, sr.startedAt, sr.completedAt, u.name, u.role
ORDER BY sr.id;

FROM scenario_runs sr
JOIN users u ON sr.userId = u.id

WHERE u.name = 'Expert Validator'
GROUP BY sr.id, sr.scenarioId, sr.isDemo, sr.status, sr.startedAt, sr.completedAt, u.name, u.role
ORDER BY sr.id;
